title: prunus persica subsp. platycarpa
intro: Prunus persica subsp. platycarpa, also known as the flat peach, is a subspecies of peach tree native to China, characterized by its flat, elliptical stones and delicious, sweet fruit. The medicinal properties of Prunus persica subsp. platycarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of consuming Prunus persica subsp. platycarpa fruit include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing essential vitamins and minerals. Prunus persica subsp. platycarpa can be prepared as a tea, dried fruit, or juice, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
